content.problemStatement:
Consider an array AAA consisting of NNN positive elements. The frequency array of AAA is the array BBB of size NNN such that Bi=B_i =Bi​= frequency of element AiA_iAi​ in AAA.

For example, if A=[4,7,4,11,2,7,7]A = [4, 7, 4, 11, 2, 7, 7]A=[4,7,4,11,2,7,7], the frequency array B=[2,3,2,1,1,3,3]B = [2, 3, 2, 1, 1, 3, 3]B=[2,3,2,1,1,3,3].

You have lost the array AAA, but fortunately you have the array BBB.

Your task is to construct the **lexicographically smallest** array AAA such that:


1≤Ai≤1051\le A_i \le 10^51≤Ai​≤105;
The frequency array of AAA is equal to BBB.
If no such array AAA exists, print −1-1−1.

Note: Array XXX is lexicographically smaller than array YYY, if Xi<YiX_i \lt Y_iXi​<Yi​, where iii is the first index where XXX and YYY differ.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN — the size of the array.
The next line contains NNN space-separated integers - B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​, the frequency array.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, NNN space separated integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​, the **lexicographically smallest** array AAA. If no such array AAA exists, print −1-1−1.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10610^6106.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,2,2,2,1]A = [1, 2, 2, 2, 1]A=[1,2,2,2,1]. The element A1A_1A1​ and A5A_5A5​ have frequency 222 while A2,A3,A_2, A_3,A2​,A3​, and A4A_4A4​ have frequency 333.
Test case 222: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,2,3,4,5]A = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]A=[1,2,3,4,5]. Each element in AAA has frequency 111.
Test case 333: The lexicographically smallest array AAA having the given frequency array BBB is A=[1,1,1,1,1]A = [1, 1, 1, 1, 1]A=[1,1,1,1,1]. Each element in AAA has frequency 555.
Test case 444: No possible array AAA exists having the given frequency array.
